goal.summary: Continue P1 Tau hardening with typed evidence manifest validation.

commands_run.command: uv run ruff check --select F,I src/tau_coding/evidence_manifest.py src/tau_coding/cli.py tests/test_evidence_manifest.py
uv run pytest tests/test_evidence_manifest.py tests/test_project_dag.py tests/test_generic_dag.py tests/test_generic_provider_adapter.py -q

commands_run.result: No whitespace errors reported for tracked diffs

what_changed: Added tau.evidence_validation_receipt.v1 receipts for path, sha256, JSON root schema, and declared validator/valid checks.
Added focused tests for PASS, sha mismatch BLOCKED, schema mismatch BLOCKED, and CLI receipt writing.
proves: Tau can deterministically validate a typed evidence manifest and write a receipt.
Tau blocks evidence items with sha256 mismatches.
Tau blocks JSON evidence items whose root schema differs from the manifest declaration.
The evidence validation CLI writes the requested receipt path and exits successfully for valid evidence.
does_not_prove: Semantic correctness of artifact contents beyond declared schema/hash checks.
Runtime integration that makes every DAG required_evidence item mandatory through evidence_manifest validation.
Provider/model quality, live Herdr behavior, GitHub mutation, Memory sync, or browser UI proof.

next_recommended_route.reason: Wire evidence manifests into project DAG required_evidence gates or continue P1 command-spec trust policy.
